results.title: Alfa Laval: Corporate
results.content: We create better everyday conditions for people. We do this by contributing to a more sustainable future through engineering innovation.

results.title: What we do - Alfa Laval
results.content: Alfa Laval is a leading global provider of first-rate products in the areas of heat transfer, separation and fluid handling.

results.title: Alfa Laval: Heat transfer, separation and fluid handling
results.content: Alfa Laval is a global leader in the design and manufacture of fluid handling equipment, epitomizing innovation, efficiency and reliability.

results.title: Alfa Laval - Creating better everyday conditions for people
results.content: Alfa Laval has a broad range of products and systems for purifying waste water and for removing the salt from seawater to make it drinkable.
